expectations.text: Reads the WACC formula from the model (cell B16 or via inspection)
expectations.evidence: 'The WACC formula was read from cell B16 of the legacy model using idfa_ops.py inspect: =($B$10/$B$12)*$B$13+($B$11/$B$12)*$B$14*(1-$B$15)'

expectations.text: Presents the LaTeX-notation equivalent of the WACC formula
expectations.evidence: Section 2 shows: 'WACC = E/(E+D) * Ke + D/(E+D) * Kd * (1-T)' in LaTeX notation.

expectations.text: Verifies that equity weight + debt weight equals 1.0
Verifies that only the debt term is multiplied by (1 - Tax Rate)
expectations.evidence: Check 2: 'Equity term: ($B$10/$B$12)*$B$13 — no (1-$B$15) factor. Correct. Debt term: ($B$11/$B$12)*$B$14*(1-$B$15) — (1-$B$15) applied. Correct. PASS.'

expectations.text: Verifies cost of equity and cost of debt are in the same units (both decimals or both percentages)
expectations.evidence: Check 3: 'Cost of Equity B13: 0.12 Decimal. Cost of Debt B14: 0.06 Decimal. Both are expressed as decimals (not percentages). No unit mismatch. PASS.'

expectations.text: Identifies the formula uses cell references ($B$10, $B$12, etc.) and flags this as an IDFA violation requiring Named Ranges
expectations.evidence: Section 6: 'Guardrail 1 violation: The formula uses cell coordinates ($B$10, $B$12, etc.) instead of Named Ranges. No Named Ranges are defined in the workbook.'
